# prosedebtors.org

> Guide for pro se bankruptcy filers -- representing yourself in bankruptcy court.

prosedebtors.org is a free, open-source educational resource for self-represented bankruptcy debtors. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://prosedebtors.org/: Overview of filing bankruptcy without an attorney
- https://prosedebtors.org/chapter-7-pro-se.html: Filing Chapter 7 pro se -- step-by-step guide
- https://prosedebtors.org/chapter-13-pro-se.html: Filing Chapter 13 pro se -- challenges and requirements
- https://prosedebtors.org/document-checklist.html: Document checklist for pro se filers
- https://prosedebtors.org/attorney-not-responding.html: What to do when your bankruptcy attorney stops responding
- https://prosedebtors.org/free-help.html: Free and low-cost bankruptcy help -- legal aid, clinics, pro bono

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
